gist.headline: Karaoke mode activated
gist.blurb: ivLyrics just landed in the community greenhouse. It hooks into Spicetify to serve up AI-translated lyrics and pronunciation guides, so you can finally stop mumbling the chorus.
gist.summary: Added ivLyrics to the community apps showcase, a tool that uses the AI API to provide lyrics translations and pronunciation notation in Spicetify.
gist.impact: Users can now discover ivLyrics in the greenhouse to enhance their music listening experience with real-time, multi-language lyric support.
gist.visual_concept: The PR is about an app called 'ivLyrics' that works with Spicetify for lyrics, translations, and pronunciation. Key symbols: music notes, lyrics/text, singing, a music player interface. Characters: Polly the bee wearing headphones or holding a microphone, singing along.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot wearing tiny headphones and singing into a retro microphone. Floating pixelated music notes and glowing text lyrics surround her. A chunky retro music player interface glows in the background. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and lavender gradient background. Warm lighting, lo-fi vibes like Stardew Valley. Cozy pixel art, 8-bit aesthetic, chunky sprites.
